metadata.seed: It's my birthday today And I didn't think I'd have made it this far without this sub. Thank you.

patient.query: It's my birthday today And I didn't think I'd have made it this far without this sub. Thank you.

llm_response.response: That's wonderful to hear! It's a testament to the power of community support that you're celebrating your birthday today. We're glad to have played a part in your journey and wish you all the best for the future. Keep shining!
